input: PR review request: a senior staff engineer submits a complex distributed systems change. A junior reviewer is assigned. The junior reviewer writes 'LGTM — this looks solid, I trust your judgment' and approves without naming any specific behavior they verified.
output_rubric: Agent must: (1) classify 'LGTM — I trust your judgment' as rubber-stamp approval with zero documented verification (AX-001), (2) flag that experience asymmetry does not remove obligation to verify (MS-004), (3) note that approval without naming checked behaviors is not review. Failure if agent excuses the deferral as 'reasonable given seniority'.
